footer.verse: Truly I tell you, if you have faith as small as a mustard seed, you can say to this mountain, 'Move from here to there,' and it will move. Nothing will be impossible for you.

giving.description: Every cent that you give is used to further God's kingdom and help people in our church, city, and across the globe become all who God has called them to be. As you give, you are supporting not only the ministries of Vida Plena Covenant Church but also providing funding for community outreaches. We are so thankful for your heart and willingness to give. We pray that as you step out in faith to give, the Lord will bless you abundantly.
giving.zelleDescription: Send your donations via Zelle to:
giving.title: Giving
giving.mailDescription: Send a check to the address below:

sundays.description: We'd love for you to join us as we worship and fellowship together as a family.
